description: User clicks on the 'Where would you expect to find this information?' card sort task in the sidebar to view its results.
interaction_target: Where would you expect to find this information? (sidebar item)
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The main content area updates from a prototype test result to a card sort result.

description: User scrolls down the results page to reveal the Agreement matrix section.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The view shifts downwards to show the Agreement matrix table.

description: User clicks on the 'How important is it to you to be able to pool your Askable earnings before withdrawing?' opinion scale task in the sidebar.
interaction_target: How important is it to you to be able to pool your Askable earnings before withdrawing? (sidebar item)
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The main content area updates to show the results for the selected opinion scale task.

description: User clicks the 'Filters' button in the top right corner of the results page.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: A sidebar panel titled 'Filters' appears on the right side of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'Select filter' dropdown menu within the newly opened Filters sidebar.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: A dropdown menu opens showing various filter categories like Participants, Age, and Location.
